hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /home/toyama-ryosuke/ghq/github.com/nangashi/terminal && TMPDIR=/tmp pnpm biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; TMPDIR=/tmp pnpm oxlint "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20;; *.rs) rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); PROTECTED="biome.json .oxlintrc.json rustfmt.toml lefthook.yml"; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE" in *$p*) echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is a protected config file. Fix the code, not the linter/formatter config." >&2; exit 2;; esac; done'
